questions.text: After a design review, leadership requires the team to design reliable systems on GCP. Which approach is MOST reliable?

questions.text: Two designs were proposed. Design A would infrastructure as code on GCP. Design B would preview infrastructure changes. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?

Email configs (not recommended for production workloads)
ClickOps only (not recommended for production workloads)

questions.explanation: IaC enables repeatable environments. Compare with Terraform plan or Deployment Manager previews: Previews reduce deployment surprises.

Your startup is building on Google Cloud and needs to centralize org security findings.

Two designs were proposed. Design A would encrypt data with customer-managed keys. Design B would centralize org security findings. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?
questions.explanation: KMS manages encryption keys. Compare with Security Command Center: SCC aggregates risk across projects.

questions.text: Two designs were proposed. Design A would centralize org security findings. Design B would encrypt data with customer-managed keys. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?
questions.explanation: SCC aggregates risk across projects. Compare with Cloud KMS: KMS manages encryption keys.
